display.purpose: Page titles and largest dashboard numbers.

headline.purpose: Section titles inside cards and dialogs.

title.purpose: Card headers, list-section titles, and modal titles.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, table cells, form labels, and descriptions.

label.purpose: Badges, input labels, table headers, and timestamp metadata.

shadows.name: soft-float
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, autocomplete panels, and floating tooltips.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, and color transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button used for save, submit, and primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0284c7; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); border-color: #6366f1; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Non-primary action that still needs a visible button affordance.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); }

components.name: Light Input
components.description: Standard text/number input for the light content stage.
components.css: .ds-input-light { background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-light::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input-light:focus { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); } .ds-input-light:disabled { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Dark Input
components.description: Input variant used inside dark POS contexts such as inward and items.
components.css: .ds-input-dark { background: #09090b; color: #fafafa; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-dark::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-input-dark:focus { border-color: #818cf8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.2); } .ds-input-dark:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Light Card
components.description: Default content container for the light main stage.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card-light { background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #334155; }

components.name: Dark Card
components.description: Content container used inside dark POS contexts.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.6); color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-dark-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-dark-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Dark zinc sidebar used for the app shell.
components.html: ● Sales● Inventory
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 240px; background: #09090b; border-right: 1px solid #27272a; padding: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: #a1a1aa; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #fafafa; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.1); color: #0ea5e9; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; text-align: center; }

narrative.northStar: The Shop Counter at Opening Hour
narrative.overview: PaintKiDukaan is a desktop point-of-sale tool used by paint-shop owners while they are standing at a counter, often under fluorescent light, frequently interrupted. The interface is not here to impress; it is here to get out of the way. Every surface, color, and motion choice is calibrated for legibility, speed, and trust. The system runs on a split environment: the app shell uses a dark zinc ground so navigation recedes, while the main working surfaces use a light slate ground with white cards. A small number of POS-adjacent screens intentionally use the dark shell ground to visually group operational inventory tasks.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette with one cool accent (sky) and a secondary indigo focus ring.
State-rich surfaces: loading, empty, error, and success states are first-class components.
No decorative glass, gradients, or heavy shadows.
Consistent component vocabulary; inline re-implementation is prohibited.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Sky and Indigo are the only accent colors. Success and Danger are reserved for status semantics. No page should introduce a new hue for decoration.

rules.name: The Context Rule
rules.body: Light surfaces belong inside the main content stage; dark surfaces belong to the shell and the explicitly dark POS contexts (inward, items, barcodes). Do not mix light cards into a dark wrapper or dark cards into a light wrapper on the same screen.

rules.name: The Numbers Must Line Up Rule
rules.body: Any price, quantity, or ID column uses tabular-nums so columns stay aligned when values change.

rules.name: The One Font Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only type family. Do not introduce a second display or mono font.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, sections, and lists sit flat on their ground. Shadows are reserved for floating overlays and modals only.

rules.name: The No-Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a wide soft shadow on the same element. Pick one: a clean border, or a defined shadow at ≤8px blur.

dos: Do reuse the shared primitives in src/components/ui/ and src/shell/components/ instead of inlining raw Tailwind classes.
Do use tabular-nums for any numeric column that will change during use.
Do provide an empty state, skeleton, or error fallback for every async surface.
Do keep motion between 150ms and 250ms and use ease-out curves for state changes.
Do use the dark context only for the app shell and the explicitly dark POS screens (inward, items, barcodes).
Do wrap every top-level route in an ErrorBoundary so a crash in one page cannot take down the whole app.
donts: Don't introduce a third accent color or decorative gradients.
Don't use glassmorphism, heavy drop shadows, or blur as decoration.
Don't inline raw bg-zinc-950, border-white/10, or bg-slate-50 classes on new components.
Don't show a blank screen or silent failure while data is loading or after an error.
Don't use motion purely for entrance drama.
Don't mix light and dark card/input styles on the same screen.
